exact_feature_contract.oi_change: log(sum_open_interest) change on completed 15m decision rows at 15m and 1h horizons
exact_feature_contract.oi_normalization: rolling 30-day mean and standard deviation, both shifted one completed 15m row
exact_feature_contract.oi_state: arithmetic mean of the 15m and 1h OI-change z scores, clipped to [-6, 6]
exact_feature_contract.metrics_flow: (sum_taker_long_short_vol_ratio-1)/(sum_taker_long_short_vol_ratio+1) from the latest causally available metrics row
exact_feature_contract.flow_state: arithmetic mean of kline_flow and metrics_flow, clipped to [-1, 1]
exact_feature_contract.premium_z: latest completed 5m premium-index close standardized by a shifted 30-day rolling mean/std
exact_feature_contract.reversal_flow: failed raid direction must have been aggressive: -trade_side*flow_state >= threshold
exact_feature_contract.continuation_flow: trade direction must have been aggressive: trade_side*flow_state >= threshold
exact_feature_contract.reversal_confirmation: completed 15m reclaim plus trade-side body >=0.20 ATR15 and directional CLV >=0.55
exact_feature_contract.continuation_confirmation: body and directional CLV use their predeclared threshold grids

exact_rule_library.reversal_rules: level(2) x OI threshold(2) x flow threshold(2) x premium limit(2) = 16
exact_rule_library.continuation_rules: level(2) x OI threshold(2) x flow threshold(2) x body threshold(2) x CLV threshold(2) x premium limit(2) = 64
exact_rule_library.adjacency: same branch and level, differing by one adjacent threshold index in exactly one dimension
exact_rule_library.stable_rule: passes all development/internal-validation gates and has at least one passing adjacent rule

candidates: union of both if both exist
final_candidate_selection.selection_score: maximize min(development_lb80_mean_R, validation_lb80_mean_R), then min PF, then trade count
final_candidate_selection.global_slot_tie_break: largest threshold-normalized event strength, then BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP deterministic order
